title: Report on the proposed Life Sciences Large Investment Portfolio scheme by the Office for Life Sciences
body: "The SAU has published a report providing advice to the Office for Life Sciences (OLS) concerning its proposed Life Sciences Large Investment Portfolio scheme.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of OLS’ Assessment of Compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed Life Sciences Large Investment Portfolio scheme by the Office for Life Sciences "
